ball_event: out Obstructing the field!! A length delivery by Prince Yadav and Angkrish Raghuvanshi nudges it towards mid-on. He sets off for a single
event_info: but Green sends him back. The throw came in at the batter's end who got back in with a dive. The throw also hit Angkrish Raghuvanshi and Shami is appealing for an obstructing the field dismissal. The on-field umpire takes it upstairs and the third umpire is having a look at the replays. He reckons the batsman has changed his direction and the third umpire reckons he's out - obstructing the field. The KKR camp isn't pleased. They are surprised at the verdict. Raghuvanshi looks disappointed too as he walks back to the pavilion. He smashes hit bat on the floor and throws away his helmet in frustration. That will go down as a controversial decision. Things going from bad to worse for KKR. They are three down within the powerplay. Abhishek Nayar is still arguing with the fourth umpire. He is having an animated chat. Angkrish Raghuvanshi obs 9(8) [4s-1]

He was sent back and Prince Yadav had all the time in the world to walk upto the stumps and inflict the run-out. He runs towards the stumps and tries to have an underarm throw; but fails to score a direct-hit. Prince is annoyed that the bowler wasn't behind the stumps to collect this ball. Has been an eventful powerplay so far. It's all happening at the Ekana. Prince tried to run across and then under-arm because Rathi was not close to the stumps; he has a go at the spinner after missing the stumps for the same

ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! That's Rinku at his best. He is one of the best catchers in the outfield in the world. Along with Salt
event_info: he doesn't drop anything if at all. This is full on off; Aiden Markram gets forward to loft and has struck it cleanly; but Rinku is at long-off; he takes it; both feet are close to the cushions; one after the other. Rinku though shows great presence of mind; knows how to keep them away from them and then throws it up; goes out and comes back to take it. He does a little jig too. Superb catch ends the stand and gives KKR hope. Aiden Markram c Rinku Singh b Cameron Green 31(27) [4s-2 6s-1]

Again Varun Chakaravarthy shows emotion as he celebrates. That is a key wicket for KKR. Ayush Badoni c Anukul Roy b Varun Chakaravarthy 24(19) [6s-2]

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: the googly from over the wicket; spins away; good length; George Linde slashes and misses

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: Powell is down and he has dropped that at long-off. It's a wide length delivery outside off; George Linde reaches for it and lofts; Powell got there on the dive to his right. He doesn't even get a fingertip on that; the hands were close to the ball; but it misses them. Varun Chakaravarthy is not happy. Powell is a great fielder but once he got there; would've backed himself to take it

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: flat back of a length outside off; George Linde goes on the back foot and pulls; Ramandeep runs and tries to push it back from long-on. But the ball touches the cushions as he is outside them. That was bowled so quick and sat up short for Linde to pull

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: full and wide outside off from round the wicket; Himmat Singh gets forward to drive to long-off

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! Third catch for Rinku and that should be the end of LSG. Vaibhav Arora follows George Linde outside the leg-stump
event_info: full and slightly cramps him; he gets forward to loft and he has not got the elevation to clear long-on. Rinku accepts it with glee. Langer and Bharat Arun with glum faces in the LSG dugout. George Linde c Rinku Singh b Vaibhav Arora 8(4) [4s-2]

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: the wide yorker and it's wide of the tramline on the off-side; Mohammed Shami can't lay bat on ball; given as a wide

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: Mohammed Shami gets into the act. Rahane is not happy with Vaibhav Arora. It's full and in the slot on off; Shami gets forward and lofts; nearly six; just falls in front of the cushions at long-off. Rinku was not near the ball

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: a juicy low full-toss and across Mohammed Shami outside off; he slashes and misses. Shami has a chat with Himmat Singh. Then gets back to his crease

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: short of length and bouncy outside off; Mohammed Shami helps the cut wide of backward point and gives the strike to Himmat Singh

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: Himmat Singh finds the boundary. Full and wide outside off; on the tramline; Himmat shuffles across and gets near the ball; carves it over the vacant cover-point area. Runs away

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: 1 run; Tim Seifert fumbles and he allows Himmat Singh to get back on strike. A slower-ball off-cutter on a length outside off; Mohammed Shami slashes and misses; bounces in front of Seifert

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: the beamer and thankfully Himmat Singh is fine. That was Brett Lee-esque. It's right at the right bicep of Himmat who top-edges the pull to the top of the helmet. He is fine. As he shakes the blow off. A free-hit coming up as it's a no-ball. Rinku is furious as he gestures suggesting why not bowl the slower-ball. Kartik Tyagi wanted to bowl the yorker but it came out as a high full-toss

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: 2 runs; another over the waist full-toss. It's called a no-ball. Kartik Tyagi with another full-toss; Himmat Singh gets forward to loft and it's caught by Powell at long-on. Won't matter as it's a free-hit. KKR review this. But will be a no-ball. The waist is at 1.01m; the ball is at 1.08m. So KKR lose the review. Abhishek Nayar wants Anukul to bowl. Bravo meanwhile wants the slower-ball into the wicket. Tyagi is off the bowling attack for bowling two beamers? No. The umpires have had a discussion and reckon that the 2nd high full-toss was not dangerous. So Tyagi to continue. Rahane and the team had a chat and they were ready to change the bowler. Not to be

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: the free-hit goes for four. This is a slower-ball short delivery and Himmat Singh picks it; he goes on the back foot and pulls to the vacant deep backward square-leg fence. Knew what Kartik Tyagi will bowl and was ready for it

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! Rinku at deep backward square-leg has taken this. The move to bring in a deep backward square-leg has worked. This is a length delivery outside off
event_info: Himmat Singh shuffles across and heaves; hits it flat but doesn't have the power or timing; picks out Rinku who won't drop that. Relief for KKR and LSG have the opposite emotion. What a game we have here. It twists and turns. This was pace-on and it worked for Tyagi. Himmat Singh c Rinku Singh b Kartik Tyagi 19(10) [4s-2 6s-1]

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: 1 run; slower-ball short of length and outside off; Prince Yadav shuffles across and looks to scoop; again Tim Seifert doesn't glove it clean. There was a chance of a run-out at the bowler's end; but Tyagi collects the ball and by then Prince was in. For LSG; it is Mohammed Shami who will be on strike

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: short of length and pace-on outside off; Mohammed Shami slashes and misses. A dot and Rahane has a chat with Kartik Tyagi who nods in agreement

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
event_info: we have a Super Over. Look at Rinku and Dwayne Bravo's faces. Also Watson's. They can't believe it. They look shell-shocked. Avesh is grinning from ear to ear meanwhile. This is full and pace-on; on the stumps; Mohammed Shami can tonk them. He doesn't bother to get in line; stays leg-side with all stumps showing; gets forward and lofts; all theway over long-off. Ramandeep watches the ball sail over. Shami walks off calmly while Rahane and Kartik Tyagi have a chat. We are going into a Super Over
